title: fumaria sepium
intro: Fumaria sepium, also known as lesser fumitory, is a flowering plant species belonging to the fumitory family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Fumaria sepium has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for herbal remedies, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine due to its potential therapeutic applications.
